title: 7 Stocks Ready to Soar After Flattening at Lows
text: Value investors seeking the best stocks to buy may use a company's 52-week low as a key metric to consider. Stock Rover's screener provides a simple-to-use option for investors to find such stocks which have traded at those lows within the last 15 days.

title: Automotive 3D Sensing And EVs Could Spike Lumentum's Price
text: Lumentum is a designer of optical and photonic products enabling optical networking and laser applications. Considering the growth of the company's target industries, I believe that many investors would enjoy having a look at Lumentum.

title: Why Lumentum Stock Flashed Red on Tuesday
text: Bad news on Q2 overshadows good news on Q1 for this pricey lasers stock.

title: Lumentum Holdings Inc. (LITE) Q1 2023 Earnings Call Transcript
text: Lumentum Holdings Inc. (NASDAQ:LITE ) Q1 2023 Results Conference Call November 8, 2022 8:30 AM ET Company Participants Kathy Ta - VP, IR Alan Lowe - President and CEO Wajid Ali - CFO Chris Coldren - SVP and Chief Strategy and Corporate Development Officer Conference Call Participants Samik Chatterjee - JP Morgan Simon Leopold - Raymond James Meta Marshall - Morgan Stanley George Notter - Jefferies Vivek Arya - Bank of America Alex Henderson - Needham Tom O'Malley - Barclays Ananda Baruah - Loop Capital Michael Genovese - Rosenblatt Securities Dave Kang - B. Riley Operator Good day, everyone, and welcome to the Lumentum Holdings First Quarter Fiscal Year 2023 Earnings Call.

title: Lumentum (LITE) Q1 Earnings and Revenues Surpass Estimates
text: Lumentum (LITE) delivered earnings and revenue surprises of 8.33% and 0.25%, respectively, for the quarter ended September 2022. Do the numbers hold clues to what lies ahead for the stock?

title: Lumentum stock plunges after earnings forecast underwhelms
text: Shares of Lumentum Holdings Inc. LITE, -1.65% were falling 15% in premarket trading Tuesday after the optoelectronics company, which is a supplier to Apple Inc. AAPL, +0.39% , delivered a downbeat forecast amid supply challenges. The company posted a fiscal first-quarter net loss of about $400,000, or 1 cent a share, whereas it recorded net income of $81.5 million, or $1.08 a share, in the year-earlier period.
